svg.title: Contact page funnel architecture — /contacto
svg.desc: 3-step funnel: intent capture → qualification → scheduling via HubSpot
svg.text: /contacto — funnel architecture
Goal: move a curious visitor to a scheduled demo in ≤3 steps. No friction, no long forms.
Step 1 · Intent & qualification (above the fold)
Headline: "Hablemos. Sin compromisos." · Sub: 1-sentence on what happens next
MATY
Juanito
Roboto
Visitor selects 1–3 products they're interested in (pill toggle, not a dropdown). Optional: company size selector.
This selection pre-populates HubSpot deal properties — zero extra work for sales.
Dev note: state lives in React, passed as URL params to HubSpot embed in Step 3.
Step 2 · Contact details (minimal — 4 fields max)
Fields: Name · Work email · Company · Role/title
No phone. No "message" text area. No company size dropdown. Friction kills conversion.
CTA button: "Agendar una llamada" → triggers Step 3. Also show: "Prefiero que me contacten" → sends to HubSpot, team follows up.
HubSpot: form submission creates contact + deal. Tags deal with product selection from Step 1.
i18n: es/en parity required. Privacy link mandatory (GDPR-adjacent, good practice for global).
Step 3 · Schedule (inline embed — stay on page)
HubSpot Meetings embed — inline `<iframe>`, not a redirect. Syncs with Google Calendar + Teams.
Meeting type: 30-min "Demo & discovery call". Pre-fill name + email from Step 2.
Confirmation: on-page thank-you state (no redirect). Shows: meeting summary + what to expect.
Fallback for "prefiero que me contacten": confirmation message only, no calendar. Team gets HubSpot task.
Post-conversion (HubSpot handles, no extra dev)
Auto email: confirmation + calendar .ics · HubSpot sequence: reminder 24h before · Deal moves to "Meeting scheduled" stage.
Analytics: track funnel drop-off per step (Vercel Analytics events or GTM). Key metric: Step1→Step3 conversion rate.
No-show handling: HubSpot task auto-created for CEO/COO to follow up.
Dev implementation notes
UI: single page, steps rendered conditionally (React state machine — not separate routes). Back button between steps.
HubSpot: use HubSpot Forms API (not embed snippet) for full control over styling + i18n.
HubSpot Meetings: embed via `<script>` + `<div data-hs-meetings-embed>` — customizable with pre-fill params.
Env var needed: NEXT_PUBLIC_HUBSPOT_PORTAL_ID · HUBSPOT_FORMS_API_KEY (server-side only)
